note: D_comp/D_yield formulas match frame-level values on 14127 checked rows; max abs errors were ~1e-15. Historical one-sided sign bug not found in current features.
No direct future leakage found in primary rolling features or fold preprocessing. Future-leaky control is now genuine, non-deployable, and excluded from NULL-robustness claims.
Primary uses rolling high-support AUC features; full/future-window IPV appears only as a labelled diagnostic negative control.
IPV tails are not a simple raw-kinematic recoding: max primary-sample abs Spearman with baseline features was 0.334, but deterministic trajectory overlap remains an interpretation boundary.
Coordination is an official generated/report metric with rule/kinematic components, not proven expert rating. This limits criterion-validity and social-ground-truth wording.
16771 frame rows are aggregated to 150 cells; primary CV has 48 prediction rows and 48 unique cells.
Phase 6 correctly says pre-onset NPC matching is not identifiable and runs no causal NPC effect analysis.
Primary uses high-support cells only; low-support/fallback-heavy state-dependence rows are labelled abstain or boundary.
No nominal NSFC conformal coverage claim found; freeze forbids it.
State-dependence FDR was honored: no favorable row has q<=0.10; the only q<=0.10 row is reverse/context-mismatch A1 fallback and is labelled abstain.
No direct train/held-out contamination found; preprocessing and residualization are train-fold-only in code, and prior stats review found held-out outcome perturbation changed predictions by 0.
Prior signed approximately 0.255 and related patterns are labelled exploratory in plan/tried/claims artifacts.
Primary sample is small and selected: current structural N=48, T8 absent, included cells have higher mean coordination and efficiency than excluded cells. This limits generalization.
Blind package is anonymized but incomplete; no two-human labels or event-IPV tests exist, so H3 remains blocked.
Balanced SLSQP is a power/noise caveat, but real optimizer sign reconfirmation passed.
00_entry and 90_report are still placeholders; no final reader narrative overclaim exists yet, but report build must wait for blocker fixes.
